summary: Iteration 123 - Landing Page: Founder Transparency Section + FAQ Corrections + A/B Hero Copy. All 3 tasks verified and working correctly. FounderSection component properly placed between FAQ and Urgency sections with all required content. FAQ items 0 and 7 updated with correct pricing info. A/B hero copy test working with localStorage persistence and correct variant rendering.
test_credentials: No login required for landing page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 123 features verified on LandingPageV2.tsx: (1) TASK A - FounderSection: data-testid='founder-section', SectionLabel 'The builder', headline 'Built by someone who lost clients to spreadsheets', 3 body paragraphs mentioning photography/design/fine art, attribution '— Emmanuel, founder of KOLOR Studio', 3 credibility signal cards (GDPR-native, Global-first, Built in public), two-column grid layout on desktop. (2) TASK B - FAQ Corrections: Item 0 contains $97/no recurring/$19/month/$29/month, no 'free forever'. Item 7 contains 'single Pro plan'/$29/month/white-labelling, no stale content. (3) TASK C - A/B Hero Copy: localStorage('kolor_hero_variant') stores 'control' or 'fine_art', hero section has data-variant attribute, fine_art variant shows 'For fine artists' pill and 'The CRM built for fine artists' headline, control variant shows 'Beta is live' pill and 'The studio behind your best work' headline.

A4_headline.details: Headline contains 'Built by someone who' and 'lost clients to spreadsheets'

A5_industries.details: All 3 industries (photography, design, fine art) mentioned in body paragraphs

A6_attribution.details: Found '— Emmanuel, founder of KOLOR Studio'

A7_credibility_signals.details: All 3 signals found: GDPR-native, Global-first, Built in public

C1_data_variant.details: Hero section has data-variant attribute (control or fine_art)

C3_fine_art_pill.details: Fine art variant pill: 'For fine artists · No CRM has been built for you. Until now.'

C4_fine_art_headline.details: Fine art headline: 'The CRM built for fine artists.' (verified via screenshot)

C5_control_headline.details: Control headline: 'The studio behind your best work.' (verified via screenshot)
